title: [MTR3/4] British Rail Classes 323 & 157
description: Resource pack that adds BR Classes 323 & 157 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **British Rail Class 323** is a class of Electric Multiple Unit (EMU) manufactured by Hunslet TPL and Holec Ridderkerk UK between 1992-1994. They are ordered by British Rail's Regional Railways sector, and is intended to be used on mainly Cross-City Line and Leeds / Bradford <-> Skipton / Ilkley lines. However the latter one doesn't happen, instead they got Class 308 EMUs from Network SouthEast sector. Ultimately 43 units were built, where 26 of them works on the Cross-City Line, and another 17 of them the electrified network from and to Manchester, mainly Glossop / Crewe / Liverpool - Manchester. 34 units are in service with Northern trains, and the other 9 units are in storage, mostly likely to be scrapped in the future.

The **British Rail Class 157** Strathclyde Sprinter was a designation of Diesel Multiple Units (DMU) that would be manufactured by Hunslet TPL and Holec Ridderkerk UK between 1992-1994. They are intended to be used for regional services, partically with the Strathclyde area with Strathclyde Passenger Transport Executive (SPT). However as British Rail start to privatise and lack of funding, the order of these units was cancelled, and as replacement SPT ordered a batch of Class 170 instead.

This resource pack is to add the Classes 323 and 157 (fictional) into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 from Februrary 2024, with the latter assuming they use the same body frame as the former.

# What will be in this pack?
### British Rail Class 323:
1. WMR Livery
2. Northern Trains Livery
3. KTM Class 81 livery (WMR Interior, fictional)
4. 323221 WMR Regional Railways livery

### British Rail Class 157 (Fictional):
1. ScotRail Saltire Livery

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, West Midlands Trains Limited, Northern Trains Limited or ScotRail Trains Limited.
